objective: Freeze one shared Salt closure-bundle contract for both ROM lanes
done_when: Bundle artifact names fields and scope are stable enough for code implementation

objective: Publish the narrowed correlation registry with admitted versus blocked status
done_when: Every first-pass closure used by either ROM lane is source-tagged and status-tagged

objective: Treat straight friction as the first defended hydraulic import and keep redevelopment separate
done_when: Both ROM lanes can import the same admitted straight-friction fit without hiding local losses or K_eff inside it
blocking_dependency: late-window retained-time hardening is still desirable but not required to start

objective: Carry UA' and HTC as the primary thermal import surfaces and keep direct Nu narrow
done_when: Both ROM lanes can run on the safe Salt thermal subset while direct Nu stays left_lower_leg only
blocking_dependency: broader branchwise retained-time thermal support remains future work

objective: Keep K_eff in readiness-only mode and publish the exact missing observables
done_when: Both ROM lanes preserve the blocker explicitly and use hydraulic residuals instead of invented defended feature coefficients

objective: Implement the imported-bundle replay lane in the current solver workspace
first_output: Fluid replay/import lane and CFD-only scorecard
done_when: The current solver replays the seven defended Salt cases from the shared bundle without reopening the baseline predictive workflow
blocking_dependency: requires separate code-workspace task and write access there

objective: Build the clean Salt-first seven-element ROM skeleton
first_output: salt_cfd_rom solver skeleton and replay runner
done_when: The clean ROM consumes the same shared bundle and runs the same seven Salt cases with explicit residual buckets
blocking_dependency: requires separate code-workspace task and write access there

objective: Run the CFD-only ROM scorecard and cross-path comparison
done_when: Both ROM lanes have smoke and full-replay results reported against the same CFD bundle boundary

objective: Refresh the report after new retained-time hydraulic or thermal observables land
first_output: future package refresh in this report root
done_when: K_eff readiness and wider direct Nu opportunities are reevaluated against new defended evidence
blocking_dependency: continuation/bracket maturity or new extractor delivery
